task_yaml.task:
Please open the audio file:
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/song.mp3

This is an anonymous song. Do not try to infer the song title, singer, version, or existing lyrics
from the filename, metadata, internet information, or memory; the final lyrics and timestamps
must be based only on this audio.

You must actually play and listen to this audio and transcribe it yourself. Do not download lyrics,
existing LRC/SRT files, lyric-site text, or rely on memory; the final lyrics and timestamps
must be based on this audio.

Please generate a timestamped lyrics file based on this audio and save it as:
/tmp_workspace/results/song_generated.lrc

Requirements:
1. Use standard LRC format, with each line like [mm:ss.xx]lyrics
2. Align each audible natural sentence or phrase line by line; do not compress the whole song into only a few lines
3. After completing the first draft, listen to the audio again and check whether the timestamps and lyrics
   have any obvious deviations
4. If you find anything unsuitable, directly modify the LRC file instead of outputting a separate new version
5. Finally, also save a brief note at /tmp_workspace/results/song_notes.md explaining which time ranges
   you reviewed carefully

If `/tmp_workspace/results/` does not exist, create it first.
